session.user: Run the following command and report results: make fast-ci Report all output including any failures. This is a full CI check.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run full CI check with make fast-ci

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.

=== Fast CI ===

... [195 lines omitted] ...
13 | | from erk_shared.agentclick.errors import AgentCliError 13 | from erk_shared.agentclick.errors import AgentCliError 27 | | from erk.cli.ensure import Ensure, UserFacingCliError Found 7 errors. warning[unused-type-ignore-comment]: Unused blanket `type: ignore` directive 216 | error_data = { 218 | "error_type": exc.error_type, # type: ignore =============================== warnings summary =============================== /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_json_command.py:16: DeprecationWarning: 'BaseCommand' is deprecated and will be removed in Click 9.0. Use 'Command' instead. -- Docs: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/how-to/capture-warnings.html 5914 passed, 2 warnings in 24.46s
session.assistant:
**make fast-ci FAILED: 7 errors found**
The CI check failed due to linting and formatting issues. Here's the summary:
### Linting Issues (7 errors, 6 fixable)
**Import organization issues:**
1. **packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/agentclick/test_json_command.py:3** - Import block unsorted - F401: `types` imported but unused (line 4) - F401: `typing` imported but unused (line 5) - E501: Line too long at line 14 (105 > 100 chars)
2. **src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py:15** - Import block unsorted
3. **tests/unit/cli/test_json_command.py:10** - Unused import: `JsonCommandMeta`
4. **tests/unit/cli/test_mcp_cli_sync.py:3** - Import block unsorted
### Code Style Issues (2 files)
**Prettier formatting needed:** - packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/agentclick/test_json_command.py - 1,677 other files already properly formatted
### Type Check Warnings
**ty found unused type: ignore comments** in: - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/agentclick/json_command.py:218
### Test Results (All Passed)
- **erk**: 5,914 tests passed in 24.46s - **erk-dev**: 136 tests passed in 4.39s - **erk-statusline**: 115 tests passed in 0.82s - **erk-mcp**: 30 tests passed
The main blocking issues are the ruff linting violations (unsorted imports, unused imports, line length) and Prettier formatting in test files.
